title: Fastly Dictionary Item
description: A single key-value pair within a Fastly edge dictionary. Dictionary items are versionless and can be updated without requiring a new service version. Updates are available at the edge within approximately 30 seconds.

dictionary_id.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the parent dictionary.

service_id.description: The alphanumeric string identifying the service.

item_key.description: The key of the dictionary item.

item_value.description: The value of the dictionary item.

created_at.description: The date and time the item was created.

updated_at.description: The date and time the item was last updated.

deleted_at.description: The date and time the item was deleted.
